scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,bot,frontend -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w bot" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:no-bot: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w bot
